title: The Best People
writer: David Gray, Avery Hopwood, Bernard McConville
actors: Warner Baxter, Esther Ralston, Kathlyn Williams
plot: Bertie and Marian Lenox are children of a wealthy family, and their mother intends that they marry "within their class". They, however, have different plans--Bertie is in love with chorus girl Sally O'Neil and Marian loves Henry M...
